_comment: Curated layer of headline announced / under-construction AI megacampuses that OSM doesn't yet capture well. Coordinates are approximate campus locations drawn from the cited public sources. Maintained by the daily editorial pass: re-check status and capacity, add newly-announced campuses. capacity_mw uses the headline planned full-buildout figure where stated.

facilities.name: Stargate Site 1 (Lancium Clean Campus)
facilities.summary: Flagship site of the $500B Stargate project (OpenAI, Oracle, SoftBank), built by Crusoe on the Lancium Clean Campus. ~1.2 GW planned across eight buildings; first ~300 MW already running NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs as of 2025. The single most prominent purpose-built AI training campus in the US.

facilities.name: Meta Hyperion (Richland Parish)
facilities.summary: Meta's largest data center ever — a ~4,000-acre AI campus in rural Richland Parish designed to deliver up to 5 GW of compute, backed by a $27B+ financing deal and 10 new gas-fired plants. Built out 2025–2030 specifically for frontier AI training.

facilities.name: xAI Colossus
facilities.summary: Elon Musk's xAI training supercomputer on a former Electrolux site in South Memphis. Colossus 1 went live in 2024 (~100k–200k GPUs, ~250 MW); the Colossus 2 expansion across adjacent Memphis/Southaven buildings targets 1–2 GW. Notable for on-site gas turbines drawing local controversy.

facilities.name: Microsoft Fairwater
facilities.summary: Microsoft's self-described "world's most powerful AI datacenter" on a 315-acre Mount Pleasant site, housing hundreds of thousands of NVIDIA GB200/GB300 GPUs. Projected to draw ~3.3 GW by late 2027 across a campus expanding toward ~9M sq ft; first buildings coming online in early 2026.

facilities.name: AWS Project Rainier (New Carlisle)
facilities.summary: Amazon's massive New Carlisle, Indiana campus — the compute backbone of "Project Rainier" dedicated largely to Anthropic's Claude model training. A multi-billion-dollar, multi-gigawatt build using AWS's custom Trainium accelerators.

facilities.name: Meta Prometheus (New Albany)
facilities.summary: Meta's "Prometheus" AI cluster near New Albany, Ohio — among the first ~1 GW-class AI supercomputing campuses Meta expects to bring online (targeted 2026), part of its multi-hundred-billion-dollar superintelligence infrastructure push.
